title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Official Trustees Act, 1913. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2* * *. (3) It shall come into force on such date3 as the Central Government, by notification in the Official Gazette, may direct.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for sub-section (2). 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 25 of 1968, s. 2 and Schedule (w.e.f. 15-8-1968). 3. The 1st April, 1914, see Gazette of India, 1914, Pt. I, p. 365.
